refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using mission data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with traceability links
Version-controlled management system for baseline and calibration updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, traceable database, and version-controlled management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and database schema
Version control dependencies on update management
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability and update management cohesively.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely mission context data
Risk of complexity in maintaining traceability links over time
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth and consider modularizing update management if diffusion risk increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other system modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports update synchronization and baseline/calibration history management

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full DP; low diffusion risk due to centralized management.
Minimal containment; would cause high diffusion risk if assigned here due to unrelated scope.
No containment; unrelated to performance requirement derivation.
Limited containment possible for safety-related performance targets, but overall low fit.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the DP in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update management effectively.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth within NGHE Solution module if not carefully managed
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data inconsistencies
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Establish clear interface contracts and monitor module complexity to avoid diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical cohesion and traceability, satisfying the high safety criticality.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized DP in NGHE Solution module
Potential interface complexity with Telemetry and Network Link
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting ownership clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity within NGHE Solution module to avoid diffusion over time
Define and validate interface contracts with Telemetry and Network Link early

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping from FR to DP to IM is consistent, with clear ownership and manageable risks. Verification approaches are feasible and aligned with safety criticality.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
Interfaces Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link are stable and reliable
open_risks: Complexity growth within NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability and history management in prototype
Validation of derivation algorithms under safety critical conditions
